problem: Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs?
mechanism: CRISPR gene editing targeting specific pathway
hypothesis: CRISPR gene editing targeting specific pathway may resolve Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 27 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
